images.prompt: A visual diagram showing how a large language model predicts the next word. A sequence of Vietnamese words flowing left to right with probability percentages above candidate next words. Clean educational style.
An AI robot confidently presenting false information on a screen, while a human detective with a magnifying glass checks the facts. Warning triangle symbol. Educational illustration.
A hexagonal diagram showing 6 components of an effective prompt: Role, Tone, Task, Format, Constraints, Audience. Each hexagon has a small icon. Center says Prompt. Clean infographic.

Split screen comparison. Left side: a person typing many messages back and forth with a chatbot (5 message bubbles). Right side: a person giving one brief to an AI agent robot who autonomously completes multiple steps. The agent side shows efficiency and automation.

A workflow diagram showing: customer order document on the left, flowing through an AI agent in the center, combining with a contract template, outputting a completed contract on the right. Vietnamese business context. Clean process flow.

A horizontal bar representing an AI context window. Left 40 percent is green labeled Smart Zone with a brain icon. Middle 20 percent is yellow labeled Caution Zone. Right 40 percent is red labeled Dumb Zone with a warning icon. Clean diagram.

A central AI brain connected to multiple tools via cables: a file folder, a web browser, a database, a calendar, and a document. Each connection is labeled. Model Context Protocol concept. Clean tech illustration.

An exploded view of a SKILL.md document showing its 6 sections as separate cards: Name, Description, Input, Steps, Output, Constraints. Each card has a small icon. Like a blueprint or recipe card layout.
